cases.input: Critique this 2-step signup screen. User goal is to create an account on mobile; the submit button has no loading state and Cancel is the same visual weight as Create.
Apply the design system to this dashboard kit; the current success badges render green and some warning chips use white text on a light amber tint.
Spec a reusable Toggle switch component with on/off, disabled, and loading states, including its props contract and keyboard behavior.
Rewrite the error message shown when a card payment is declined at checkout so it is blameless and tells the user the next action.
Design the UX for a 5000-row invoices data grid that needs column sort, row selection, and a bulk archive action without losing scroll position.
Design the no-data screen a brand-new user sees in the Projects tab before they have created anything.
We just cloned JM-ADK and there is no task context yet; what should greet the operator on first run?
Define the open and close transition for a confirmation modal, including duration, easing, and reduced-motion handling.
Design the query and filter experience for a document search with faceted filters and a no-results state.
Design a new logo and brand color palette for our consulting practice.
